tool.name: index_align_scrs_targz
tool.description: Single-Cell RNA-Seq (scRNA-Seq) analysis. Tracks gene expression at single-cell level using cell barcodes.
tool.command: mkdir -p /genome /scratch && tar -xf '$genome_tar' -C /genome && tar -xf '$scratch_tar' -C /scratch && bash /home/index_align.sh $bamsave > '$output_log' 2>&1 && tar -chzf genome_archive.tar.gz -C /genome . && tar -chzf scratch_archive.tar.gz -C /scratch . && true

param.name: bamsave
param.label: Whether to save the BAM file
